source_label: @linode on X — "We pronounce it Lih-node - 'lin' as in Linux!"
notes: Cloud host (acquired by Akamai in 2022; now Akamai Connected Cloud), from "Linux node"; the official @linode account clarified "We pronounce it Lih-node - 'lin' as in Linux!", though LIE-node remains a common mispronunciation.
